claim_boundary: These null-route siblings prove that the augmentation court is testing route quality, not route eagerness.

rows.alpha_liability: Alpha can stop at a locally good answer without pricing downstream failure cost.
rows.objective: Same downstream frame, but the path is already linear enough that static alpha should stay canonical.
